description_long: This is a modern, single-family house with a white exterior and a black gable roof, featuring a spacious wooden deck that includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an outdoor dining area with an umbrella. The house has large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto the deck, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. A driveway leads to an attached garage, with a car parked in front, and the property is bordered by low hedges and a paved walkway. The landscaping includes several trees, both leafy green and blossoming, adding a touch of nature and privacy to the setting. The main entrance is accessible via a short set of steps and is sheltered by a small overhang. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of architecture and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern white house with a black gable roof, large windows, a wooden deck with a pool, and an attached garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, pool, deck, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the length of the wooden deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, pool, deck furniture, and more of the garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the pool, deck, and sliding glass doors leading into the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, short steps, and direct access from the driveway
